title: Light Ukrainian Chocolate Cake
description: A light and floral chocolate cake that is perfect for kids and gluten-free friendly. The plain chocolate cake serves as a beautiful introduction to the flavors of Ukraine without overwhelming sweet tastes.
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Grease a cake pan and line with parchment paper.

In a large mixing bowl, combine the all-purpose gluten-free flour, cocoa powder, brown sugar, oil, eggs, milk, vanilla extract, salt, and baking soda. Mix until well combined; be careful not to overmix.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow cake to cool in the pan before removing parchment paper.
